what_it_does: A Layer-5 deep-read document consolidating the Company's governing laws, its self-description mechanism, the where-things-go table, and the operational structure, synthesized from the root AGENTS.md/MAP.md/STATE.md plus module constitutions and the ops CLI files. Every claim is tagged observed/inferred and given a BUILT/PARTIAL/DESIGNED status.
observations: Enumerates the ten governing rules (build-against-contracts, schema-additive, one-source, fail-loud, ext4-storage, no-Gemini, stage-gated, author-from-registry, AI-operated-not-review-free, commit-to-main) plus the path-of-least-resistance meta-law, each with a BUILT status and source.

Describes the two-tier self-description maintenance model: Tier 1 auto-regenerated by Suite.refresh_self_description() into marker-delimited MAP.md/STATE.md blocks; Tier 2 prose maintained by integration, enforced by tests/drift_acceptance.py.
Provides a distributed drift-home table mapping each module registry (EDGE_KINDS, RULE_OPS, THOUGHT_SHAPES, MODEL_CAPABILITIES, etc.) to its drift-home prose section and named enforcement suite.
Reproduces the consolidated where-things-go table (node-type, model, storage backend, RHM verb, mode, panel, extension, contract, role, service) with key constraints.

Details the ops layer: the company CLI (up/down/status/gpu/models/swap/config/telemetry), services.json structure (vram_ceiling 16376, combos, 5 groups), gpu.py VRAM functions, and capabilities.py as the third model-keying.

Flags FE legibility gaps: show's resolver covers 9 regions not 68 element addresses, NODE_STATES not FE-wired, workshop self-change surface not built, design-lint not enforced at component build time.
States the D3 law (one substrate, per-type view-modes) with a status table showing services/models-VRAM/model-capabilities BUILT and cognitive-layers/RHM-modes/data-memory/jobs-cron DESIGNED.
standouts: The drift-home pattern: add a registry value -> add it to its drift home -> a named acceptance suite fails loud if you miss it (rule 3 + rule 4 applied to documentation).
The path-of-least-resistance meta-law framed as the operating principle from which rules 3/4/8/10 derive.
The three model keyings (services.json deployment, telemetry.jsonl, capabilities.py intrinsic) and the rule-3 boundary that capabilities.py never stores gpu_util/vram but JOINs to gpu.py.
conventions: Uses observed/inferred labeling and per-section BUILT/PARTIAL/DESIGNED status tags, matching the repo's evidence discipline.
Carries full frontmatter (type, layer, subject, source-files, produced, status, relates-to wikilinks) per the vault self-description convention.
Names source files for every section and distinguishes auto-maintained vs hand-maintained items in a table.
notes: If briefing someone: this is the laws-and-operations bible for the repo, the single place to learn the ten rules, how self-description auto-maintains and fails loud on drift, where every kind of thing goes, and how the ops console/VRAM machinery is structured.
apparent_themes: Self-description as load-bearing orientation infrastructure, not bolted-on docs
One-source / registry-is-truth applied uniformly to code, models, and documentation
Fail-loud enforcement via named acceptance suites (drift caught, never silent)
Systemd-is-muscle, console-is-map division of operational responsibility
The backend registry discipline is tight while the FE legibility surface lags
intention_signals: Trying to hand the integrating design session a complete, proof-backed account of the rules it must obey and the operational/self-description machinery it must compose on, so any surface it designs consumes registered single-sourced shapes rather than introducing parallel definitions.
novelty: The distributed drift-home pattern (per-module registry -> prose home -> enforcement suite) and the D3 one-substrate-per-type-view framing of the ops console as the first of many type-views.
contribution: Contributes the consolidated law set, the two-tier self-description mechanism with its drift-home enforcement table, the where-things-go table, and the operational/VRAM/model-capability structure; a fused system keeps this as the conventions-and-operations layer that governs how anything new is added and kept legible.
summary_for_embedding: A Layer-5 deep-read consolidating the Company's ten governing laws, its auto-maintained-plus-drift-checked self-description mechanism, the where-things-go table, and the ops console/VRAM/model-capability operational structure, each claim tagged observed/inferred with BUILT/PARTIAL/DESIGNED status.
intention_for_embedding: To give the integrating design session the binding rules, self-description machinery, and operational structure it must compose on so it consumes registered single-sourced shapes instead of redefining them.
